items.title: Deterministic team installs
items.scenario: Five engineers and CI must all build a RAG app with the identical dependency set.
items.explanation: poetry.lock pins every version, so poetry install reproduces the same environment everywhere.

items.title: Separating dev tools
items.scenario: pytest and ruff are needed locally and in CI but should not ship to production.
items.explanation: poetry add --group dev keeps them in a separate group, excluded from runtime installs.

items.title: Resolving a tangled tree
items.scenario: Several Gen AI libraries impose overlapping constraints on a shared dependency.
items.explanation: Poetry's solver finds a mutually compatible version set or reports a clear conflict.

items.title: Packaging an internal library
items.scenario: A reusable prompt/utility package needs to be built and published to an internal index.
items.explanation: poetry build and poetry publish handle packaging from the same pyproject.toml.
